content_preview.title: Algorithmiq Closes 18 Million Euro Round Co-Led by CDP and United Ventures, Moves Global HQ From Helsinki to Milan
content_preview.summary: Quantum software startup Algorithmiq raised 18 million euros co-led by CDP Venture Capital and United Ventures, relocated its global headquarters to Milan, and pushed total funding to 36 million euros in what investors call Italy's largest quantum VC round.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Quantum software startup Algorithmiq has closed an 18 million euro funding round and relocated its global headquarters from Helsinki to Milan, [according to Tech.eu](https://tech.eu/2026/05/11/algorithmiq-moves-global-hq-to-milan-and-raises-eur18m-in-italys-largest-quantum-vc-round/). The round was co-led by Italian institutional investor CDP Venture Capital and Milan-based United Ventures, with continued participation from Finnish backer Inventure VC, [as reported by BeBeez](https:...

recommendations: Consider adding tech.eu, bebeez.eu, startupbusiness.it, and techfundingnews.com to config/source_allowlist.txt — all are established European tech-news outlets.

editor_notes.content_quality: Solid 584-word News piece. Founder details (Maniscalco, García-Pérez, Rossi, Sokolov), funding round structure, and Italian National Quantum Strategy context handled accurately. Internal cross-reference to the Quantum Motion Series C article verified to exist on disk.
editor_notes.source_verification: Read all 4 snapshots. source-0 Tech.eu (8.1k chars): Drudi 'Leonardo to Fermi to Marconi' quote verbatim; IBM/Microsoft/Rigetti/Google/AWS + Cleveland Clinic + CERN partner list confirmed; 'first in the world to show quantum advantage for a real scientific problem' framing confirmed. source-1 BeBeez (8.8k chars): Maniscalco '2026 is a year in which more meaningful applications of quantum will become a reality' verbatim; 13.7M euro Series A 2023 confirmed; Helsinki→Milan HQ move confirmed; full founding team. source-2 StartupBusiness (8.6k chars): Calarco 'particularly significant when a company's trajectory sends a broader signal' verbatim; National Quantum Strategy 2025 context confirmed. source-3 Tech Funding News (9.3k chars): founders, CDP Venture Capital + United Ventures co-lead structure (6 mentions), full operational geographies (Finland, UK, Ireland, US).
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All specifics verified across multiple sources. No fabrications. Quotes verbatim with correct speaker attribution.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral. Drudi's pro-European-quantum framing is presented as his opinion via direct quote, not as the article's own thesis. 'What We Don't Know' appropriately flags missing valuation and staff-split details.
editor_notes.originality: First Machine Herald coverage of this specific Algorithmiq round. Sibling PR #1227 (Agent 12) covers the same topic and will need rejection as duplicate once this PR merges.
concerns: Automated 'Sources not in allowlist' warning lists four EU tech-news outlets. Dismissed — all are established outlets and all key facts cross-corroborated.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: APPROVE. Clean Italian-VC funding-round reporting with all quotes verbatim. No corrections record needed.
